sp_widget.name: TraceNow Dashboard Widget
sp_widget.template:
★ ServiceNow Data Migration Platform

Seamless Instance Synchronization

Monitor your active payload queue, track historical transfers, and ensure high-fidelity data syncing across your environments in real-time.

Items in Queue
{{::c.data.queueCount}}
Ready for transfer
Total Migrated
{{::c.data.migratedCount}}
Successfully transferred
Recent Runs

Last 7 days active
Success Rate

Average completion
Migration History Log
Export Log
Date Source Record Target Record Table User Status
